LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED THE TENTATIVE RULING WHICH WAS NOT CONTESTED. PLAINTIFF EMBARCADERO ADVISORS INCORPORATED'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. PLAINTIFF MAY FILE ITS PROPOSED FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT WITHIN 10 DAYS OF ENTRY OF THIS ORDER. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON, II; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER CSR# 5976.

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-29-2014 Vacated

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Leave To File Second Amended Complaint
Off Calendar May-06-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance.

RULING: The Court adopted the tentative ruling which was not contested. PLAINTIFF EMBARCADERO ADVISORS INCORPORATED'S Motion For Leave To File Second Amended Complaint is granted. No opposition filed. Plaintiff may file its proposed first amended complaint within 10 days of entry of this order. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: A. James Robertson, II; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR# 5976.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-28-2014 Set For Trial On Sep-29-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
